facts.root_cause: app-config.local.yaml uses catalog.locations type:file with targets starting 'file:/...'; Backstage prefixes backend CWD => packages/backend/file:/home/...; file not found; ingest skipped.
facts.evidence_log: catalog warn: file .../packages/backend/file:/home/danie/... does not exist
facts.minimal_fix: In app-config.local.yaml: replace 'target: file:/home/danie/...' with 'target: /home/danie/...' (no file: scheme) for the two entries.
